speaker: speaker1
text: I think it's time for me to meet my admirer and make him face the music .

speaker: speaker2
text: You do ? How are you going to contact him ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm leaving him a message taped to my computer screen .

speaker: speaker2
text: What does it say ? Do you think he'll see it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: He'll see it . It says , I like sweets . Meet me at two thirty in the parking lot .

speaker: speaker2
text: Can I spy on you guys from the window ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No . But I'll fill you in later . Right now I have to find Vince .
